description.text: Hunt down the opposing team and annihilate their Base to ensure your victory. One Base.

ru.original: Hunt down the opposing team and annihilate their Base to ensure your victory. One Base.
ru.translation: Выследи врага, а затем сровняй с землей его базу. Одна база.

es.original: Hunt down the opposing team and annihilate their Base to ensure your victory. One Base.
es.translation:
Acorrala al equipo enemigo y no les des escapatoria.
Un núcleo.

de.original: Hunt down the opposing team and annihilate their Base to ensure your victory. One Base.
de.translation: Jagt das gegnerische Team und zerstört ihre Basis, um euch den Sieg zu sichern. Eine Basis.

pt.original: Hunt down the opposing team and annihilate their Base to ensure your victory. One Base.
pt.translation: Persiga a equipe inimiga e aniquile sua base para assegurar a vitória. Uma Base.

fr.original: Hunt down the opposing team and annihilate their Base to ensure your victory. One Base.
fr.translation: Traquez vos ennemis et annihilez leur base pour remporter la victoire. Une base.
